subcodes.first_line: Verily, We called unto thee from the right side of the Mount, declaring that there is no God but Him, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: م ه انا نادیناک من الشطر الایمن من الطور انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @wisdom [hikmat]
